summary: Phase 4 - Delivery System Testing Complete. All backend APIs (18/18 tests) passing. Frontend pages fully functional: Checkout with Google Maps, Order Tracking with real-time map, Driver Dashboard with order management, Admin Live Tracking with driver locations.
passed_tests: POST /api/orders - Create order with delivery address and coordinates
Complete order workflow (create → accept → pickup → deliver)
Checkout page with Google Maps address selection
Order tracking page with real-time map and status
Driver dashboard with available orders and status controls
Admin live tracking with driver map and orders table
seed_data_creation: Test orders created with TEST_ prefix during testing for workflow validation
context_for_next_testing_agent: Delivery system fully tested and working. Key features: 1) Checkout page at /checkout with Google Maps for address selection, 2) Order tracking at /suivi/:orderId with real-time driver location, 3) Driver dashboard at /livreur with order accept/pickup/deliver workflow, 4) Admin live tracking in admin dashboard 'Trajet livreurs' tab with Google Maps showing all active drivers. WebSocket integration for real-time updates. All APIs working correctly with proper status transitions.
